Bash(curl -s -X PATCH http://localhost:3100/api/knowledge/19b2cfad-c138-454a-a96b-487121c775c0 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"body":"# Architecture Guide\\n\\nUpdated by agent. Our system uses a **microservices architecture**.\\n\\n## Components\\n\\n- API Gateway\\n- Auth Service\\n- Knowledge Service\\n- Agent Orchestrator\\n\\n## Deployment\\n\\n```bash\\ndocker compose up -d\\n```\\n\\n> All services communicate via REST APIs and WebSocket events.","changeSummary":"Agent updated architecture overview"}')
